title: Tooltipz
description: Modifies tooltips (menus, items, rarity, bundles) using data components format (1.21.2+). An add-on for the Item Components mod.
body:
*****
_**Also check out the [Tooltipz resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tooltipz-rp), which adds the option to customize your tooltip frame color!**_
*****

## Tooltipz

- This mod is using data components introduced with Minecraft **1.21.2** to display rarity frames on tooltips.
- It **WILL NOT** work with mods/resourcepacks which modify the frame and background of tooltips.
- This is a bundled mod of a datapack with assets and also requires [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/wOl8aLro) to work.

Tooltips:

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6FNv53gc/images/767da550827b477c81110d02b39921714693d931.png)

Bundles:

![bundle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6FNv53gc/images/5c0f924f93b6766c047bc6c8412db75581a0cee2.png)
